topic.title: Computational Skepticism. course
topic.text:
Computational Skepticism. course

I'm excited to announce that Northeastern will teach the first class in the Irreducibly Human series this summer, Computational Skepticism. On ground in Boston and live cast to Seattle and Silicon Valley.

I created a talking book explaining the course https://www.nikbearbrown.com/talks/computational-skepticism/computational-skepticism-intro.html

Attached is the syllabus.
